item.description: You come to Imgur to waste your life, that's exactly what they take.

item.title: Me logging in today
item.description: Other people have probably already memed this better, but I just got here and this was my EXACT reaction to being given a trophy and then seeing that the "other guys" were winning the latest silly engagement ploy! (Well played, imgur. You got me this time.)

item.title: Images of Note: Someone is committing a federal crime right here!
item.description:
Basically me most days
wait mode
:O
basically this is my headcanon now
Outrageous!
fuck i hate arthur
yay
tha i a' tighinn. Chan urrain dhut ruith.
AAAAAAA
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky I'm only posting now so I can sleep in tomorrow.

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
isn't that xena? greetings online friends
it's basically a bed of it's own
yeah that's pretty good
yes
called out
i guess
it's a mess in there
the sandwich on the bottom terrifies me
mmm hmm
this aggression will not stand, man
facts
dude.. oversharing
clearly
oh please they aren't that complex
hard no
there goes my sunday plans
i actually know quite a few.. the circled one is peter stormare, he's in fargo and big lebowski and a bunch of others
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

Let the carnage be over! Also I have been given zero authority by my cohorts.
Stolen cat tax
item.dc:creator: SteveTheEgg

item.title: Took me a long time to realize that my sense of justice and fairness is actually an autism trait, not how everyone feels.
item.description: One of our small towns local, insufferabley self righteous, unreasonably popular, "man of god" maga nut - just got caught by his wife cheating on her *again* with a young employee at the hardware store he and his family own. His wife is the sweetest, hard working girl who only married him after he got her pregnant. Now they have 3 little boys. He's spent years gaslighting the ever living shit out of her and hopefully this time she will leave him for good. I think it should be aired out publicly, what a POS he is, but will wait until they finalize the divorce before saying anything. I'm so sick of these assholes getting away with being two faced shitbags and being loved by their community of "family values". His family is generationally established here and a local institution, to give you an idea of their type, the hardware store has a clause that only "direct male decendants" can buy into ownership of the store. They will make sure she gets *nothing* and cover for him relentlessly unless a public scandal is generated. It's hard to resist helping stir that up so I'm just gonna rant here and watch from the sidelines, giving her as much support as I can.
item.dc:creator: cannibalthemusical

item.title: Costco's board stays the course on DEI
item.description: https://www.newsweek.com/costco-board-shareholder-dei-hiring-2006717
item.dc:creator: dabydeen

item.title: May 22, 2022.
item.description:
376 cops (three hundred and seventy six cops) responded to the Uvalde massacre. Not a single one did a fucking thing for over an hour. The gunman just got to walk around and fuckin kill people... 9 year old children. Meanwhile...
They'll sure dress pretty for the rich folk. That crooked ass mayor's even in the fuckin picture. See those fancy ass guns that WE BOUGHT THEM? They're champin at the bit to use those to no-knock your front door and put holes in your 16 year old son over some weed.
We're just meat that better pay our taxes to them. They will let even the most vulnerable of us die (that includes you, Mr. Back The Blue) if they're not killing us themselves. FYI: The cops in Uvalde were absolved too. "There was no breach of protocol." *To protect and serve* is just a sticker on their car. They don't give a fuck about you. That's a nice watch you got on though...
item.dc:creator: DemSumBigAssRidges
